---
title: BsParser
subtitle: "valid'em"
execute:
  echo: false
---

> Validate an bsInput with one super_bcv_wrapper

::: {#inputDiv}
<!-- inputDiv is considered Void-->
:::

```{ojs}
import { bsInputgroupTransform } from "./bsui.js"
import { super_bcv_parser } from "./bsBcv.js";

superBCV = new super_bcv_parser() // instance of singleton parser

viewof refInput = new bsInputgroupTransform({
  prefixHTML: "<i class='bi bi-book'></i>",
  placeholder: "Enter Bible reference…",
  transform: superBCV.osis_array,     // <---- HERE
  fetcher: superBCV.fetchPassage,
  addLabel: "Add",
  resetLabel: "RAZ",
  clipLabel: "CLIP"
}).node()

refInput

//superBCV.fetchPassage(refInput.current);

//refInput.current   // "John.3.16"
//refInput.accum     // ["John.3.16", ...]
refInput.content   // sanitized passage_html from your Worker

//html`${refInput.content}`
```




```{ojs}
import { bsInputgroupFetch } from "./bsui.js"

//superBCV2 = new super_bcv_parser() // instance of singleton parser

viewof refInput2 = {
  const bsgroup = new bsInputgroupFetch({
    prefixHTML: "<i class='bi bi-book'></i>",
    placeholder: "Enter Bible reference…",
    transform: superBCV.osis_array,     // <---- HERE
    fetcher: superBCV.fetchPassage,
    addLabel: "Add",
    resetLabel: "RAZ",
    clipLabel: "CLIP"
  }).node();

  return bsgroup;
}

restyle = {
  // Wait until OJS inserts it into the DOM
  const container = viewof refInput2;
//  const group = container.querySelector("div.input-group");
  
  const allButtons = container.querySelectorAll("button");

  queueMicrotask(() => {
   allButtons.forEach(btn => {
      btn.classList.remove("btn-quarto");
      console.log("Hey")
    });
  });
  
/**  
  const obs = new MutationObserver(() => {
    allButtons.forEach(btn => {
        btn.classList.remove("btn-quarto");
        });
    });
    
  obs.observe(container, { childList: true, subtree: true });
*/
}

refInput2.current   // "John.3.16"
//refInput.accum     // ["John.3.16", ...]
refInput2.content   // sanitized passage_html from your Worker

```
